data.title: eXp World Holdings to announce Q4 and full-year 2025 results on Feb. 24, 2026. Investors to attend virtual event for discussion.
data.description: Executives will be reviewing the financial performance of the company for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 during a virtual event. The event will also include an opportunity for investors to ask questions. Key numbers to be discussed include revenue, profits, expenses, and any future outlook or guidance. Participants can engage in a Q&A session to gain further insights into the company's financial health and future prospects.

data.title: Meshflow Acquisition Corp. will start trading Class A shares and warrants separately on Jan 30, 2026 after initial public offering of 34,500,000 units including 4,500,000 exercised by underwriters. The units will continue to trade under "MESHU" symbol on Nasdaq Global Market, while Class A shares and warrants will trade under "MESH" and "MESHW" symbols respectively. Holders must inform brokers to separate units.
data.description: On Jan. 27, 2026, Meshflow Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: MESHU) disclosed that holders of the 34,500,000 units from its IPO, completed on Dec. 11, 2025, can choose to separately trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants included in the units starting around Jan. 30, 2026. If not separated, units will still trade on Nasdaq Global Market as "MESHU", while the shares and warrants will trade as "MESH" and "MESHW" respectively. Only whole warrants will be available as no fractional warrants will be given upon separation. Holders must have their brokers contact Continental Stock Transfer & Trust Company, the Company’s transfer agent, for the separation process.

data.title: HP Inc. declares dividend of $0.3000 per share on common stock.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, on January 27, 2026, HP Inc. announced a cash dividend of $0.3000 per share for its common stock traded on the NYSE under the symbol HPQ.

data.title: Amer Sports to redeem $80 million in Senior Secured Notes due 2031 at 103% value on Feb 6, 2026. Earnings date announced.
data.description: Amer Sports, Inc. revealed today that it is redeeming $80 million worth of its 6.750% Senior Secured Notes due 2031. The redemption date is set for February 6, 2026, with the redemption price being 103.000% of the principal amount of the Notes, in addition to accrued interest up to the Redemption Date.

data.title: Whitestone REIT (NYSE: WSR) reveals tax characteristics of 2025 distributions to shareholders (CUSIP 966084204) on Form 1099-DIV.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Whitestone REIT (NYSE: WSR) announced the federal income tax treatment of the cash distributions for 2025 to common shareholders. The distributions for 2025, identified by CUSIP 966084204, will be classified for tax purposes as reported on Form 1099-DIV.

data.title: AMCON Distributing Company to pay $0.18 quarterly dividend on Feb 27, 2026, for shareholders as of Feb 6, 2026.
data.description: An Omaha, Nebraska-headquartered company, AMCON Distributing Company (“AMCON”) (NYSE American: DIT), a distributor in the convenience and foodservice sector, recently reported that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.18 per common share. Shareholders as of the record date February 6, 2026, are set to receive this dividend on February 27, 2026. AMCON, along with subsidiaries Team Sledd, LLC and Henry’s Foods, Inc., is a prominent player in the convenience and foodservice distribution industry.

data.title: Raymond James introduces digital AI agent Rai for operational support, leveraging natural language processing.
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida on January 27, 2026, Raymond James revealed the introduction of Rai, their exclusive AI operations agent. Dubbed Rai, the artificial intelligence agent utilizes natural language processing and generative AI to offer instant, tailored responses and advice for operational queries drawing from various company knowledge sources. Rai continuously refines its capabilities by adapting to user behavior and preferences, embodying Raymond James' service-oriented, enduring AI strategy.

data.title: Valmont Industries will release Q4 & full year 2025 earnings on Feb 17, 2026. CEO & CFO to host webcast.
data.description: Omaha-based Valmont® Industries, Inc. (NYSE: VMI), a renowned global provider of infrastructure products and agricultural solutions, is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The results will be disclosed on Tuesday, February 17, 2026, before the market opens. Avner M. Applbaum, the President and CEO, along with Thomas Liguori, the Executive Vice President and CFO, will conduct a webcast following the release to discuss the numbers and provide insights.

data.title: Thomas W. Horton, 64, joins Chevron's Board of Directors as Independent Director; Partner at Global Infrastructure Partners.
data.description: Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) has added Thomas W. Horton, 64, to their Board of Directors as an Independent Director. Horton, a partner at Global Infrastructure Partners and former senior advisor at Warburg Pincus, will also serve on the Board Audit Committee. Horton brings experience from his previous roles as chairman of American Airlines Group, Inc., and chairman, CEO, and president at a leading private-equity investor.

data.title: Rayonier & PotlatchDeltic merger approved by stockholders, closing on Jan 30 after final voting results.
data.description: Wildlight, Florida and Spokane, Washington - Rayonier (NYSE: RYN) and PotlatchDeltic (Nasdaq: PCH) have disclosed that their merger has been approved by their shareholders. The final voting results will be detailed in separate Form 8-Ks to be filed with the SEC. The merger is slated to be finalized after market hours on January 30, 202_.

data.title: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. to discuss Q4 2025 results on Feb 19, 2026; Nasdaq: CWST. Financials for December 31, 2025.
data.description: Casella Waste Systems, Inc., a company focused on solid waste, recycling, and resource management services, will be announcing its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 19, 2026. The report will cover the three months ending on December 31, 2025, and will be disclosed after the market closes. Casella Waste Systems, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol CWST. Investors and stakeholders will be able to access the figures and insights from their performance during this period, providing crucial information for market analysis and future projections. The release of these results will offer transparency regarding the company's financial health and performance metrics, aiding in better understanding its position in the industry.

data.title: NGS Chairman Emeritus Stephen Taylor to retire as Director after 20+ years of service.
data.description: In Midland, Texas, on January 27, 2026, Natural Gas Services Group, Inc. (NGS), a prominent supplier of natural gas compression equipment and services to the energy sector, revealed that Stephen Taylor, Chairman Emeritus and board member, will retire at the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. Taylor's decision means he will not seek re-election to the Board, marking the end of more than 20 years of outstanding leadership and dedication to NGS.

data.title: National Bank Holdings Corporation reports fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Jan 27, 2026.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, National Bank Holdings Corporation, also known as NBHC, released its financial report.

data.title: Monro (NASDAQ: MNRO) reports Q2 2026 earnings on 2026-01-28, with analysts expecting an EPS of $0.13. Past performance saw a share price drop of 2.62% after beating EPS by $0.03 last quarter. Shares were at $20.23 on Jan 26, with a -1.06% return in the last 52 weeks. Analysts highlighted the importance of understanding market sentiment and expectations for Monro. [Total characters: 348]
data.description: Monro (NASDAQ: MNRO) is set to release its quarterly earnings on January 28, 2026. Analysts expect an EPS of $0.13, with investors eager for results surpassing projections and positive guidance for the next quarter. The company's past performance shows mixed results in meeting estimates. In the last quarter, Monro beat EPS by $0.03, causing a 2.62% share price drop the following day. Shares were priced at $20.23 on January 26, down 1.06% over the past 52 weeks. Analysts emphasize the importance of understanding market sentiments and industry expectations in decision-making, thus it's crucial for investors to stay informed about Monro's performance in the industry.
